npc_grandpa.text: PATIENCE, BARREN. THE RIGHT PRICE ALWAYS COMES TO THOSE WHO WAIT.

npc_store_clerk.text: THAT MR. MARKET FELLOW KEEPS CHANGING HIS PRICES. CAN'T TRUST HIM.

npc_rival.text: MR. MARKET SAYS YOUR PRICES ARE TOO LOW.

boss_greed_01.text: I'LL BUY YOUR ROUTE FOR 50 COINS!

boss_greed_02.text: 75 COINS. FINAL OFFER. SURELY YOU'LL TAKE IT!

boss_panic_01.text: NOBODY WANTS PAPERS! I'LL SELL YOU BACK FOR 20 COINS!

boss_01_wisdom_quote: THE STOCK MARKET IS A DEVICE FOR TRANSFERRING MONEY FROM THE IMPATIENT TO THE PATIENT.
